# Java GraphQL Reference

## Framework Signals

- Spring GraphQL: `@QueryMapping`, `@MutationMapping`, `@SchemaMapping`.
- graphql-java: `DataFetcher`, `RuntimeWiring`.
- graphql-java-kickstart annotations.
- Schema files: `.graphqls`.

## Review Points

- Per-resolver authorization.
- Nested field authorization.
- Tenant scoping in data loaders.
- Query depth and complexity limits.
- Batched query controls.
- Introspection and GraphiQL exposure.
- Injection through resolver arguments into downstream sinks.
